details.test: Task 1: Order maize high-density SNP panel and add 2 units to cart
Task 3: Select wheat targeted sequencing service (<=21 days, < $80) for 96 samples and add to quote
Task 4: Build learning plan with 3 rice genomic selection courses
Task 5: Save wheat leaf DNA extraction 96-well protocol to saved resources
Task 6: Create sorghum project Drought_Trial_2026 with traits and exactly two locations
Task 7: Submit custom chickpea assay request (500-1000 markers, 30 days, 2000 samples/year)
Task 8: Compare two MAS ROI scenarios and save analysis with preferred scenario
Task 9: Collect 3 content items into "Africa Maize Impact" reading list
